# Automme — AI Growth Systems
> Automme designs, deploys, and maintains AI infrastructure that runs mission-critical operations for B2B companies across 40+ industries.

## About
Automme is an AI systems firm founded by Meheraz Maruf. We build high-performance AI automation for business growth, lead generation, content production, and operations.

## Services
- AI Systems & Infrastructure
- Operations Automation
- AI-Driven Content & Marketing
- Scaling Strategy
- AI Training & Consulting

## Pricing
- Engagements start at $5K
- Most projects range $10K-$50K
- Fixed price, clear scope
- Free 30-minute growth mapping call available

## Industries
We serve 40+ industries including dental, e-commerce, law firms, real estate, healthcare, SaaS, construction, and more.
